options.content:
# User IO Breakdown
Complete breakdown of all IO operations for a selected user. See what they accessed, when, how much data, and via which protocol.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT count(*)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')

SELECT sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')

SELECT sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND not rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')

SELECT sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT path.path)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')

SELECT client_ip AS "Client IP",
       IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS "User",
       protocol AS "Protocol",
       rpc_type AS "RPC Type",
       path.path AS "Filename",
       to_iso8601(time) AS "Time",
       status AS "Status",
       num_bytes AS "Size",
       num_ops AS "Operations"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY client_ip,
         IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)),
         protocol, rpc_type, path.path, to_iso8601(time),
         status, num_bytes, num_ops
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1000

SELECT rpc_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY rpc_type
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT protocol, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY protocol
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT element_at(split(path.path, '.'), -1) as "Extension",
       sum(num_bytes) as "bytes"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')
  AND strpos(path.path, '.') > 0
  AND num_bytes > 0
GROUP BY element_at(split(path.path, '.'), -1)
ORDER BY sum(num_bytes) DESC

SELECT path.path AS file_path,
       COUNT(*) AS ops
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
  AND rpc_type NOT IN ('READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'MKDIR', 'RMDIR')
GROUP BY path.path
ORDER BY ops DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT element_at(split(path.path, '/'), -2) AS directory,
       COUNT(*) AS ops
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY element_at(split(path.path, '/'), -2)
ORDER BY ops DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Avg Ops/Sec Over Time by IO Type

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', time) - (extract(minute from time) % 5) * interval '1' minute as time,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('READ', 'READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'GET_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Read",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Write",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('CREATE', 'MKDIR', 'MKNOD') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Create",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('DELETE', 'REMOVE', 'UNLINK', 'RMDIR', 'DELETE_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Delete",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('RENAME') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Rename",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('LOOKUP', 'GETATTR', 'ACCESS', 'READLINK', 'SETATTR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Metadata",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type NOT IN ('READ','READDIR','READDIRPLUS','GET_OBJECT','WRITE','PUT_OBJECT','CREATE','MKDIR','MKNOD','DELETE','REMOVE','UNLINK','RMDIR','DELETE_OBJECT','RENAME','LOOKUP','GETATTR','ACCESS','READLINK','SETATTR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Other"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE starts_with(path.path, '${dir_prefix}')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
  AND starts_with(login_name, '${user_prefix:raw}')
  AND starts_with(rpc_type, '${action_prefix}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', time) - (extract(minute from time) % 5) * interval '1' minute
ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT login_name FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table WHERE login_name <> 'audit' AND login_name IS NOT NULL AND login_name <> '' AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/') ORDER BY login_name
list.description: Select a user to view their IO breakdown
list.label: User
list.name: user_prefix

query.query: SELECT DISTINCT login_name FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table WHERE login_name <> 'audit' AND login_name IS NOT NULL AND login_name <> '' AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/') ORDER BY login_name

title: VAST Audit Log — User IO Breakdown
